New version available: {version}.

Do you want to start the automatic update? (The application will restart automatically)
update_error_no_build:
Version {version} is available, but no matching build file (*.exe) was found in the release assets.

Please update the program manually on GitHub.
update_error_source:
Version {version} is available.

You are running the application from source code. Please update the repository manually (e.g., git pull).
update_waiting_exit: Waiting for the application to exit...

update_error_replace_desc: The program might still be running or Administrator privileges are required.

{error}
chk_dont_show_again: Don't check for updates at startup
